prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约23096名、26958名、39121名、39059名、33835名。2023年出现明显后移（39121名），2024年基本持平，2025年显著回升至33835名，近两年呈回暖趋势，2025年基准位次约33835名；该校在山东省综合类招生计划2021年430人、2022年436人、2023年432人、2024年437人、2025年452人，呈稳步小幅扩招态势；2026年计划465人，较2025年增加13人，扩招约2.9%，计划增加对录取位次有轻微下拉作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 武汉理工大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第48–55名区间（2025年第48名、2026年第54名），属中上水平理工类强校，在211高校中综合实力靠前；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及校园安全事件（南湖校区周边异常活动），可能对部分考生报考意愿产生轻微抑制；抖音热度排名第98位（一般），短视频曝光量偏低，整体报考关注度平稳；材料科学与工程（A）、机械工程（A-）、交通运输工程（A-）为该校王牌学科，与招生专业中的材料类、机械类、交通运输类等高度对应，对相关专业报考有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业近年持续高热（2024年热指数均超74），武汉理工大学作为理工特色强校直接受益；山东省2026年考生总数约72万人，较2025年增加约3.9万人（+5.7%），竞争加剧；武汉理工大学位于湖北省武汉市，在山东省招生规模较大（400人以上），属跨省招生大户；山东省考生对中部地区理工强校认可度较高，无明显地域偏好偏移。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次回暖至33835名的基准、2026年小幅扩招（+13人）对位次的下拉作用、山东省考生总数增加约5.7%带来的竞争加剧、以及工科专业持续高热对理工强校的利好，预计2026年录取位次在2025年基础上小幅后移（位次数字增大）。预测最低录取位次约34619名，波动区间34119–35119名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、软件工程、数据科学与大数据技术）
- 电子信息类（电子信息工程、电子科学与技术、智能科学与技术、通信工程）
- 微电子科学与工程（卓越英才班）
- 自动化类（自动化、机器人工程）
- 电气工程及其自动化。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等难度）
- 机械类（智能制造）（机械工程、智能制造工程、测控技术与仪器、工业工程）
- 机械设计制造及其自动化
- 数学类（信息与计算科学、统计学）
- 材料类（材料成型及控制工程、材料科学与工程、无机非金属材料工程等）
- 交通运输类（交通运输、交通工程、交通设备与控制工程）
- 机械类（车辆）（车辆工程、汽车服务工程、能源与动力工程、储能科学与工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 化工与制药类（含生物方向）（生物技术、应用化学、化学工程与工艺、制药工程）
- 土木类（土木工程、建筑环境与能源应用工程、给排水科学与工程、工程管理）
- 环境科学与工程类（环境工程、采矿工程、矿物加工工程）
- 外国语言文学类（英语、法语）
- 工商管理类（人力资源管理、工商管理、会计学、创业管理）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约34619名（区间34119–35119名），建议位次在34000名以内的考生可将一档专业（计算机类、电子信息类、自动化类、电气工程）作为冲刺目标；位次在34000–35000名之间的考生以二档专业（机械类、数学类、材料类、交通运输类）为主力选择，兼顾一档尾部专业；位次在35000名以后的考生重点考虑三档专业保底，同时关注二档中位次要求较低的专业。武汉理工大学材料科学与工程（A）、机械工程（A-）等优势学科实力突出，相关专业性价比高，值得重点关注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the Comprehensive category in Shandong Province were approximately 23096, 26958, 39121, 39059, and 33835 respectively. In 2023, there was a significant backward shift (39121), which remained basically unchanged in 2024, and rebounded notably to 33835 in 2025, showing a warming trend in the past two years, with a baseline ranking of about 33835 in 2025. The enrollment plan for the Comprehensive category in Shandong Province was 430 in 2021, 436 in 2022, 432 in 2023, 437 in 2024, and 452 in 2025, showing a steady and slight expansion trend. In 2026, the plan is 465, an increase of 13 compared to 2025, an expansion of about 2.9%, which has a slight downward pull on admission rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been stable in the 48th to 55th range in recent years (48th in 2025, 54th in 2026), making it a mid-to-upper level strong science and engineering university, with a relatively high comprehensive strength among 211 universities. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents (abnormal activities around the Nanhu campus), which may mildly suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. The Douyin popularity ranking is 98th (average), with relatively low short video exposure, and overall application attention is stable. Materials Science and Engineering (A), Mechanical Engineering (A-), and Transportation Engineering (A-) are the university's flagship disciplines, closely corresponding to the Materials, Mechanical, and Transportation categories in the enrollment majors, providing stable attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been highly popular in recent years (with heat indices exceeding 74 in 2024), and Wuhan University of Technology, as a strong science and engineering university, directly benefits. In 2026, the total number of candidates in Shandong Province is about 720,000, an increase of about 39,000 (+5.7%) compared to 2025, intensifying competition. Wuhan University of Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei Province, and has a large enrollment scale in Shandong Province (over 400), making it a major cross-provincial enrollment institution. Candidates in Shandong Province have a high recognition of strong science and engineering universities in the central region, with no significant regional preference deviation.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline of the ranking rebounding to 33835 in 2025, the slight downward pull on rankings from the small expansion in 2026 (+13), the intensified competition from the increase of about 5.7% in the total number of candidates in Shandong Province, and the continued high popularity of engineering majors benefiting strong science and engineering universities, it is expected that the admission ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward (ranking number increases) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum admission ranking is about 34619, with a fluctuation range of 34119 to 35119.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Computer Category (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Electronic Information Category (Electronic Information Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Intelligent Science and Technology, Communication Engineering)
- Microelectronic Science and Engineering (Excellent Talent Class)
- Automation Category (Automation, Robotics Engineering)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate Difficulty)
- Mechanical Category (Intelligent Manufacturing) (Mechanical Engineering, Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering, Measurement and Control Technology and Instrumentation, Industrial Engineering)
- Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation
- Mathematics Category (Information and Computing Science, Statistics)
- Materials Category (Materials Forming and Control Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Inorganic Non-metallic Materials Engineering, etc.)
- Transportation Category (Transportation, Traffic Engineering, Traffic Equipment and Control Engineering)
- Mechanical Category (Vehicle) (Vehicle Engineering, Automotive Service Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering, Energy Storage Science and Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Chemical and Pharmaceutical Category (including Biology direction) (Biotechnology, Applied Chemistry, Chemical Engineering and Technology, Pharmaceutical Engineering)
- Civil Engineering Category (Civil Engineering, Building Environment and Energy Application Engineering, Water Supply and Drainage Science and Engineering, Engineering Management)
- Environmental Science and Engineering Category (Environmental Engineering, Mining Engineering, Mineral Processing Engineering)
- Foreign Languages and Literature Category (English, French)
- Business Administration Category (Human Resource Management, Business Administration, Accounting, Entrepreneurship Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is about 34619 (range 34119–35119). It is recommended that candidates with rankings within 34000 can aim for Tier 1 majors (Computer Category, Electronic Information Category, Automation Category, Electrical Engineering) as a sprint target; candidates with rankings between 34000 and 35000 should mainly choose Tier 2 majors (Mechanical Category, Mathematics Category, Materials Category, Transportation Category) as their primary options, while also considering the tail-end majors of Tier 1; candidates with rankings above 35000 should focus on Tier 3 majors as a safety net, while also paying attention to Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements. Wuhan University of Technology has outstanding strengths in Materials Science and Engineering (A), Mechanical Engineering (A-), and other advantageous disciplines, making related majors highly cost-effective and worthy of attention.
